positive: A highly stylized, whimsical forest scene viewed through a minimalist, retro-art lens. The main subject is a bioluminescent deer (stags) with stylized antlers that branch into glowing crystalline patterns, grazing in a dense field of oversized, fantasy flora. Include elements like deep indigo mushrooms, glowing foxglove silhouettes, and meandering streams of soft, ethereal light. The composition should be perfectly centered, utilizing negative space for a clean, sticker-like quality. Use strong contrast between deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) and bright, glowing accents. Style: Clean line art merged with vector illustration, inspired by mid-century scientific diagrams and Art Nouveau posters. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, grainy, photographic, realism, text, signature, watermark, noise, ugly, poor anatomy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad composition, logo, trademark, copyrighted characters, celebrity
